creator: laurent.chardon@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #2)

I think that adding a CONFLICTS_BUILD is the wrong way to go, as it prevents something that otherwise is perfectly fine. It's unfortunate that one of the files in the nss package is called mpi.h. But it's just a name collision for one file and it has nothing to do with MPICH (or openMPI for that matter). It's perfectly safe to fix as proposed. In poudriere it will result in exactly the same code, so a new PORTREVISION is not even needed.

A number of people have been tripped up by this, it would be nice to save the next ones a little time.
